meaning: n.网,网络,网状物,净利,实价adj.净余的,纯粹的vt.用网捕,净赚,得到vi.编网 [域] Nerwork operations and service centers,网络服务商
examples: The ball rolled into the net.
His second serve clipped the net.
She clipped the ball into the net.
You can sleep soundly knowing that a parcel of your net worth is safe and sound.
But there was definitely some confusion about, as Mariko said, net worth versus self worth.
